payload.summary: Software-loop-002 is closed with a real paid DeepSeek executor lane, an independently rejected first attempt, a repaired and accepted result, and two validated invocation receipts.
claims: The executor provider was DeepSeek V4 Pro; the local Codex coordinator used gpt-5.3-codex-spark only for context transport, patch application, and command execution.
A separate GPT verifier rejected the unversioned first result and accepted the protocol-tagged repair.
All repository gates are green at closeout.
requests: Add signed provider attestations before treating receipts as cryptographic identity proof.
Add coordinator-owned append storage before claiming historical mailbox immutability.
payload.skill_evolve: updated in FishToucher AGENTS.md and normative documentation
